title: Watch: Who will win the Champions League?
bodyText:
Video

FOOTBALL NEWS AND VIDEO - Soccermag’s Dylan Johnson is joined by the Money Man as they discuss a thrilling conclusion to the 2024/25 season!


> Catch the preview for this weekend’s UEFA Champions League final between Inter and PSG!


VIDEO: Who will win The Champions League?

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
